ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock exchange was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock exchange details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the given date */,
  "split" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user started following the stock */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's following of the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "stock_id")
)
